prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约18985、21735、22539、26214、26282名，整体呈持续后移趋势，2021至2025年累计后移约7300名；2024年与2025年位次基 本持平（26214→26282），显示位次在26000名附近趋于稳定；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划从2021年124人逐年扩至2025年155人，2026年进一步扩至 170人，较2025年扩招15人（+9.7%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在49–55 名（2026年55名），属于全国百强中上游水平，办学层次稳固；该校近年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第102位，评价为一般，短 视频平台曝光量偏低，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、植物保护获评A+，食品科学与工程获评A，兽医学、畜牧学获评A-，共5个A- 及以上学科，农林学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业（计算机科学与技 术、人工智能、电子信息类等）受益；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争有所加剧；南 京农业大学位于江苏省南京市，对湖南考生属于跨省报考，无本省招生倾斜；该校在湖南招生计划占比较小，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次26282名 、2026年扩招9.7%的缓和效应与湖南物理类考生增加8.4%的竞争加剧效应，两者基本抵消；但考虑历史位次持续后移的趋势惯性，预计2026年最低录取位次在扩招带动下略有后移 。预测最低位次约27828名，区间27328–28328名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 18985, 21735, 22539, 26214, and 26282, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7300 positions from 2021 to 2025; the rankings in 2024 and 2025 were basically flat (26214→26282), indicating stabilization around 26000; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province expanded from 124 students in 2021 to 155 students in 2025, and further to 170 students in 2026, an increase of 15 students (+9.7%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 49–55 in recent years (55th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of the national top 100, with a solid academic level; its recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion incidents; its Douyin popularity ranking is 102nd, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signs of increased application interest; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science and Plant Protection were rated A+, Food Science and Engineering was rated A, and Veterinary Medicine and Animal Science were rated A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting strong agricultural and forestry disciplines, which are attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication remains high, benefiting related majors at the university (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, etc.); the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, which is a cross-province application for Hunan examinees, with no local enrollment preference; the university's enrollment plan in Hunan accounts for a small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 26282 in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 9.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensifying competition effect of an 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees, these factors roughly offset each other; however, given the historical trend of continuous backward shifts, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward due to the enrollment expansion. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 27828, with a range of 27328–28328.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3452, 3928, 4601, 4455, and 4446, showing an overall backward trend, with a shift of about 1150 places from 2021 to 2023, and a slight recovery and stabilization around 4450 in 2024–2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for History Category was 21 in 2021, 24 from 2022 to 2025, and increased to 25 in 2026, an expansion of only 1 person (+4.2%), a very small increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 55th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; the university level has average appeal to liberal arts candidates; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents; Douyin popularity is average, with no significant signs of increased application interest; Nanjing Agricultural University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in agriculture and forestry, and the History Category enrollment majors (English, Public Administration, Sociology, Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management, etc.) are weakly related to A+ disciplines, with limited impact of discipline evaluation on liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language/Literature are hot, but Nanjing Agricultural University's History Category enrollment majors are mainly management and language types, not the most popular directions; in 2026, Hunan Province has approximately 187,000 History Category candidates, a surge of about 31.2% compared to 142,500 in 2025, significantly increasing competition pressure; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, which is a cross-province application for Hunan candidates; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan History Category is very small (25 people), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 4446, the 2026 enrollment expansion of only 4.2%, and the strong contrast of a 31.2% surge in Hunan History Category candidates, the dominant factor is a significant increase in competition pressure; it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases, harder to enter). Predicted minimum ranking approximately 4527, with a range of 4027–5027.
